nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config scoped to Node-side build tooling (vite.config.ts), using bundler module resolution and ES2022 target with strict mode enabled but unused-locals/params linting disabled.

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment config: builds the Vite app via `vite build` to `dist`, deploys to iad1 region, rewrites all non-/api/ paths to /index.html for SPA routing, and sets aggressive Cache-Control headers for assets/avatars/models/images and a short SWR policy for /api/polls.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build/dev config: binds dev server to 127.0.0.1:8080 with polling watcher and an /api proxy to localhost:8787, registers the React plugin plus lovable-tagger in development, aliases @ to ./src, injects VITE_APP_VERSION (from env or `git rev-parse --short HEAD`), and defines Rollup manualChunks for three/animations/motion/radix/supabase/sentry/tanstack/icons vendor splitting.
nodes.languageNotes: readAppVersion() falls back through env var, git short SHA, then literal 'dev' so builds never fail when git is unavailable.

nodes.name: readAppVersion
nodes.summary: Resolves the app version string at build time: returns process.env.VITE_APP_VERSION if set, otherwise the short git HEAD SHA via execSync, otherwise the literal 'dev'.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest config: jsdom environment with globals enabled, loads ./src/test/setup.ts, scans src/**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}, aliases @ to ./src, and uses the React plugin so JSX/TSX tests compile.
